pageDescription: Calculate sales tax for purchases based on local tax rates

definition.title: Sales Tax Definition
definition.description: A consumption tax imposed by governments on the sale of goods and services

rates.title: Tax Rate Variations
rates.description: Sales tax rates vary by state, county, and city with combined rates reaching over 10%

applications.title: Real-world Applications
applications.description: Used by consumers to calculate total purchase costs and by businesses for tax compliance

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides sales tax estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual tax rates may vary based on specific locations and purchase types

importantNotesList: Sales tax rates vary significantly by location
Some items may be exempt from sales tax
Combined state and local rates should be used for accuracy
Rates are subject to change - verify current rates when needed

messages.enterInformation: Enter purchase amount and tax rate to calculate sales tax
messages.resultMessage: Your sales tax calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides sales tax estimates based on standard tax calculation methods. Actual tax rates may vary based on specific locations, purchase types, exemptions, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For accurate sales tax calculations and compliance information, consult tax professionals, government tax authorities, or official tax rate databases for your specific location.

errors.purchaseAmount: Please enter a valid purchase amount
errors.taxRate: Please enter a valid sales tax rate

tooltips.purchaseAmount: The pre-tax amount of your purchase
tooltips.taxRate: The sales tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 8.25 for 8.25%)
tooltips.state: State where the purchase is made (for tax rate lookup)
tooltips.city: City where the purchase is made (for tax rate lookup)
